channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I turned on Location in ChatGPT — and it changed how I searched
item.description: Enabling location services in ChatGPT offers context-aware suggestions for real life

item.title: It's no GTA 6 leak, but fans have discovered a treasure trove of hidden GTA 4 assets and an unfinished zombies mode in an Xbox 360 dev kit
item.description: Fans have uncovered a collection of hidden Grand Theft Auto 4 assets on a second-hand Xbox 360 that turned out to be a Rockstar Games development kit.

item.title: Backup Files and Your Entire Digital Life (2026): Hard Drives, Cloud-Based Tools, and Tips
item.description: Backups are boring, but they’ll save your bacon. Here’s how to make sure your data lives on, even when your PC doesn’t.

item.title: Forget copilots - NetSuite wants to be the ‘autopilot’ for your business AI journey
item.description: The investment and ambition around AI is real - and NetSuite wants to be the partner for your business.

item.title: 'Discussions have taken place': A new Avengers: Doomsday rumor suggests its release date might be changed again — and it'll be good news for Marvel fans if it's true
item.description: Speculation is rife that the next Avengers movie's release date might be changed for two very big reasons.

item.title: Notés 8/10, ces excellents écouteurs ouverts pour le sport voient leur prix divisé par deux
item.description: Joybuy casse en deux le prix des Anker Soundcore Aeroclip. Grâce à deux réductions, ces écouteurs ouverts perdent 66 euros sur leur prix, ce qui constitue une remise de plus de 50 %

item.title: Ahead of it's 25% price jump, it looks like Amazon has sold out of the white PlayStation Portal — but the midnight black version is still in stock
item.description: The PS5 is our pick for the best gaming console of this generation but time is running out to pick it up ahead of another price hike

item.title: Proton VPN expands its server network to five new countries following user demand
item.description: Proton VPN is expanding its global footprint by launching new servers in five underserved countries across South America and the Caribbean, making it easier to bypass censorship and stay secure online.

item.title: It's race season! Here's 8 running shoes I recommend, whether you're running 5ks or marathons — and they're all on sale at Amazon
item.description: I've been writing about fitness for 10 years, and I recommend these 8 running shoes on sale.

item.title: The Morning After: Meta tests Instagram Plus subscription service
item.description: Screenshots promoting "Instagram Plus" have been spotted by users in the Philippines and Mexico in recent days. According to social media consultant Matt Navarra, a subscription to Instagram Plus includes several Story-focused features not otherwise available to Instagram users. This includes the ability to create multiple audiences for Stories posts, search the list of people who have viewed your Story, extend Stories longer than 24 hours and create "spotlight" Stories. It also mentions something called “super hearts” for reacting to Stories. A spokesperson for Meta confirmed the test to Enga...

item.title: The Xbox Games Showcase 2026 airs in June and will be followed by a 'deep dive' into the Gears of War franchise with the E-Day Direct — here's when you can tune in and what to expect
item.description: Microsoft has announced plans for its annual Xbox Games Showcase this summer, along with a Gears of War: E-Day Direct.

item.title: J’ai comparé le forfait Free Max aux eSIM internationales, et le verdict est sans appel
item.description: Free vient encore de bousculer les lignes. Avec son nouveau forfait Free Max, l'opérateur propose de l'internet illimité pour moins de 30 euros par mois. Si vous préparez un voyage au Japon, par exemple, la question se pose : faut-il encore s'embêter avec une eSIM internationale ?

item.title: Amazon's Spring Prime Day ends tonight — here are 75 deals you won't regret buying
item.description: It's the last day of Amazon's Spring Sale, and as TechRadar's deals editor, I've hand-picked the 75 best deals you won't regret buying.

item.title: Vitesy Shelfy 2 Smart Fridge Purifier Review: Small Box, Big Promises
item.description: The Shelfy 2 uses some interesting science to clean the air, but the results are a mixed bag.

item.title: No, Apple isn’t rolling out its version of Samsung’s Privacy Display — but the fake viral videos are convincing
item.description: Viral videos of an alleged Apple privacy screen tool are circulating, but despite how convincing they are, it's all fake.

item.title: You Too Will Learn to Fear the XenoFrog
item.description: Artist Ed Harrington has teamed with Bottleneck Gallery to make a statue of his Kermit the Frog/Xenomorph mashup.

item.title: This App Makes Even the Sketchiest PDF or Word Doc Safe to Open
item.description: When somebody sends you a document as an attachment, don't just open it. Use the free tool Dangerzone to scrub it clean of any malevolent code. Here's how it works.

item.title: Apple at 50: a visual history
item.description: It's difficult to picture a world without Apple. The company's influence at the heart of technology and culture is so profound that even the era before the iPhone can now seem like a distant memory - and Apple existed more than 30 years before the iPhone. So, on Apple's 50th anniversary, here's a trip down […]

item.title: 'The browser has become the new endpoint': New NordLayer browser looks to help boost SMB security like never before - here's what it can do
item.description: NordLayer is jumping into the browser arena - here's what its new offering can do.

item.title: Softr launches AI-native platform to help nontechnical teams build business apps without code
item.description: Softr, the Berlin-based no-code platform used by more than one million builders and 7,000 organizations including Netflix, Google, and Stripe, today launched what it calls an AI-native platform — a bet that the explosive growth of AI-powered app creation tools has produced a market full of impressive demos but very little production-ready business software.The company's new AI Co-Builder lets non-technical users describe in plain language the software they need, and the platform generates a fully integrated system — database, user interface, permissions, and business logic included — connected...

item.title: Google renforce la sécurité de Google Drive pour se protéger des Ransomware
item.description: Les équipes de Google déploient deux nouvelles fonctionnalités de sécurité permettant d’analyser et de bloquer en temps réel les fichiers corrompus qui pourraient s’insinuer sur votre Drive.

item.title: Last chance! The drone we rate as the 'best for beginners' is on sale for a record-low price at Amazon, but not for long
item.description: DJI's 4K Mini is our favorite budget drone for beginners and experienced pilots alike — here's why today's record-low deal at Amazon is so good.

item.title: Why silence is no longer a security strategy
item.description: Why openness and context now define strong, modern cybersecurity practices.

item.title: Free Max : faut-il souscrire au nouveau forfait mobile illimité de Free ?
item.description: Après le sans engagement à prix bas en 2012 et Free Flex en 2021, Free a lancé aujourd'hui sa troisième révolution mobile : le forfait mobile Free Max. Un forfait mobile comme on en a jamais vu pour lequel "illimité" est le maître mot. Faut-il craquer pour autant ?

item.title: Cyberattaques russes contre l’iPhone : de nouveaux pirates exploitent le kit DarkSword
item.description: Un kit d’exploitation iOS ultra-sophistiqué, baptisé DarkSword, vient d'arriver entre les mains d'un nouveau gang de pirates russes. Le groupe russe TA446, alias Callisto, s’en sert à grande échelle dans des faux mails d’invitation.

item.title: Duolingo’s Luis von Ahn Wants to Delete the Blockchain
item.description: This has nothing to do with the crypto he lost the password for.

item.title: Android Auto just got a major EV route planning upgrade — and improvements to autoplay settings have also been spotted
item.description: Android Auto can now make intelligent charging suggestions based on the make and model of your EV.

item.title: Micron planche sur une combine qui tuerait l’approvisionnement en mémoire vive pour nos GPUs
item.description: Micron travaille sur une nouvelle technique d'empilement de mémoire GDDR qui devrait lui permettre une chose : rafler pour l'IA un maximum de modules de mémoire vidéo à usage général... au risque d'accroître encore plus la pénurie de cartes graphiques gaming.

item.title: Les prix des PS5 augmentent trop et très bientôt : voici les dernières offres à saisir pour la console de Sony
item.description: Les prix augmentent partout en ce moment... et ce n'est d'ailleurs pas la première hausse tarifaire pour la PS5. Mais là, ça pique vraiment : la version Standard va passer à 649 euros et la version Digitale à 599 euros. La PS5 Pro et le PS Portal sont également concernés. Il ne vous reste donc que quelques jours pour les obtenir à leurs « anciens » prix, voire même en promotion chez certains marchands. ...

item.title: What quantum technology can learn from AI’s development
item.description: Unlike AI, quantum must embed standards from the start to create an investable market.

item.title: Pourquoi Apple supprime massivement les apps de création d’apps de l’App Store
item.description: Apple fait du ménage sur son App Store et les applications qui permettent de générer des apps par intelligence artificielle sont dans son colimateur. Après avoir bloqué plusieurs mises à jour, il vient de supprimer définitivement l’application Anything de son magasin.

item.title: La « révolution » de Free s’appelle Free Max : le récap des nouveautés du forfait mobile illimité
item.description: Quand Free sort le mot "révolution", on a appris à être prudents. Mais il faut dire que l'opérateur a réussi à surprendre avec son forfait Free Max qui propose une connexion Internet illimitée dans plus de 135 destinations. Revoyez la conférence de l'annonce.

item.title: Decathlon brade son Van Rysel E‑EDR AF : 600 € de remise sur ce vélo électrique haut de gamme qui séduit les cyclistes
item.description: Decathlon propose son Van Rysel E-EDR AF Shimano 105 Di2, un modèle pensé pour allier performance, confort et assistance discrète. Ce vélo devient encore plus intéressant aujourd’hui grâce à une belle remise, le faisant passer à 2 400 euros au lieu de 2 999 euros.

item.title: Pourquoi BYD licencie 100 000 employés dans le monde… alors que ses ventes explosent
item.description: En 2025, BYD a supprimé 100 000 postes à travers le monde. Pourtant, l'entreprise chinoise produit plus de voitures électriques et hybrides qu'avant. En cause : l'arrivée des robots en masse dans les usines, et une guerre des prix féroce qui ne laisse plus la place au superflu.

item.title: AT&T now offers a single subscription for both wireless service and home internet
item.description: AT&T just announced OneConnect, a new service that lets customers sign up for both wireless service and fiber home internet under a single subscription. Pricing starts at $90. This could end up saving some serious bucks, especially for those who are paying around $100 per month for each from separate providers. These plans offer unlimited mobile data, which is great. The home internet speed caps at 1Gbps, which is a decent enough metric. Pricing starts at $90 per month, which includes a single phone line, unlimited data. This plan also covers mobile data for three devices of the user's choosin...

item.title: Free Max : les chiffres qui ont poussé Free à lancer sa « révolution »
item.description: Free a cité plusieurs chiffres intéressants qui permettent de comprendre à qui s'adresse l'offre Free Max avec Internet illimité en France et à l'étranger.

item.title: How CIOs Can Implement AI with Real Financial Intelligence
item.description: Move beyond the hype with deterministic AI architectures designed for transparency, accountability and ROI.

item.title: En ce moment, Bouygues Telecom double le stockage de votre Samsung Galaxy S26 pour le même prix [Sponso]
item.description: Avec ses forfaits Avantages Smartphone, Bouygues Telecom propose des appareils récents à des prix raisonnables, et avec une tonne d’avantages. Exemple avec le Samsung Galaxy S26, son stockage doublé et sa facilité de paiement.

item.title: Voir qui est en ligne sur WhatsApp en un clin d’œil ? C’est pour très bientôt !
item.description: WhatsApp va enfin vous permettre de voir en un coup d'œil quels sont vos contacts en ligne. Une fonctionnalité qui lui manquait cruellement face à la concurrence.

item.title: Artemis 2 by the Numbers: Breaking Down NASA’s Big Return to the Moon
item.description: Sometimes, the best way to understand a mission is to know the numbers.

item.title: Opposing ICE Might Save the Country. It Could Also Ruin Your Life
item.description: For months, lone vibe coder Rafael Concepcion has obsessively built tools to counter the federal immigration crackdown—pivoting as he’s been outmatched. He’s also lost his job and become a target.

item.title: 'Privacy shouldn't be an optional extra, it should be the default for every conversation': Proton unveils security-first alternative to Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace
item.description: Proton is putting its core apps into two Workspace subscriptions to make it easier to manage subscriptions.

item.title: Burnt-out managers are destroying teams. These 5 daily habits reverse it
item.description: Managerial burnout isn’t inevitable. These 5 habits can prevent it. I’ll never forget the morning I froze in front of a client. I was a Vice President at Kearney, the global management consulting firm, presenting our proposal to a three-person client subcommittee. Mid-sentence, my mind went completely blank. Not the normal “lost my train of thought” blank. The kind of blank that leaves a scary emptiness where confidence used to live....

item.title: Your trash can is ugly. Caraway wants to fix that
item.description: It’s the first Caraway product that isn’t about cooking—and it signals something much bigger about where the brand is headed. The modern kitchen has become a canvas for self-expression, a place where consumers obsess over aesthetics and materials with an intensity usually reserved for fashion. They carefully consider the color of their Dutch oven, the kind of wood in their cutting board, and where to display their glass canisters. And yet, tucked into the corner of that same beautiful kitchen, is almost certainly an unattractive trash can that looks like it was designed in 2000 and never revis...

item.title: Apple at 50: The tech giant’s best, worst, and weirdest ideas
item.description: Over five decades, Apple has built some of the most influential tech ever made—and some genuinely strange flops. These are the highs, lows, and oddities. Founded by Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak, Apple officially incorporated on April 1, 1976. The company helped usher in the era of personal computing, pairing meticulous design with tight hardware–software integration and a simple promise: “It just works.” Its history has been anything but linear. There were early breakthroughs, a near-collapse in the 1990s, and a dramatic revival after Jobs returned, followed by a run of mass-market hits beginn...

item.title: Inside the race to rebrand Cesar Chavez Day
item.description: In California and elsewhere, public officials aim to honor the farmworkers movement rather than the man. Cesar Chavez Day is getting a new name.

item.title: L’européen Proton lance une nouvelle offre pour attaquer frontalement Google et Microsoft
item.description: L'éditeur de ProtonMail accélère encore avec le lancement de Proton Workspace. Une solution plus complète pour s'attaquer à Google et Microsoft.
